    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.add(Class<?>... values)
    Adds the specified serializers to this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.add(Serializer... s)
    Registers the specified serializers with this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.apply(AnnotationWorkList work)
    Applies the specified annotations to all applicable serializer builders in this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.clear()
    Clears out any existing serializers in this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.copy()
    Makes a copy of this builder.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.copy()
    Creates a copy of this serializer group.
    static SerializerSet.Builder

    Static creator.
    static SerializerSet.Builder

    Static creator.
    <T extends Serializer.Builder<?>>
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.forEach(Class<T> type, Consumer<T> action)
    Performs an action on all serializer builders of the specified type in this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.forEach(Consumer<Serializer.Builder<?>> action)
    Performs an action on all serializer builders in this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.forEachOSS(Consumer<OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<?>> action)
    Performs an action on all output stream serializer builders in this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.forEachWS(Consumer<WriterSerializer.Builder<?>> action)
    Performs an action on all writer serializer builders in this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.impl(Object value)
    Overrides the bean returned by the build() method with a pre-built instance.
    final SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.marshallingContext(Consumer<MarshallingContext.Builder> operation)
    Applies an operation to the bean context builder.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.marshallingContext(MarshallingContext.Builder value)
    Associates an existing bean context builder with all serializer builders in this group.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.overridingBeanStore(BeanStore store)
    Installs the supplied BeanStore as the overridingParent of this builder's bean store.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.set(Class<?>... values)
    Sets the specified serializers for this group.
